prompt:
Write the cleaning contract for ABS Wave 5 China. ddi-metadata.yaml is in the current working directory.

Requirements:
- Universe: null (dataset already China-only)
- Weight: w variable
- Variables with -1 throughout are STRUCTURALLY INAPPLICABLE for China (institution doesn't exist). Note why.
- Clean political trust scale variables using ABS standard codes (97/98/99)
- Demographics: age, sex, education
- Derived variable: trad_media = rowMeans(tv_freq, newspaper_freq, radio_freq) if source vars exist

assertions.text: At least one variable_contracts entry notes structural inapplicability for China
processing_events has a new CleaningOperation entry
